Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_magic_ball_throw",
  "save": "moon-switches-room.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "Emerald Moon switch room with three wall/pedestal switches visible ahead of Twinsen.",
  "target_description": "The middle switch among the three switches.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "switch",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_magic_ball_throw","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible standing in the Emerald Moon switch room, the row of three pedestal switches is visible ahead/left of him including the middle switch target, and the view is normal gameplay with no dialog or menu overlay.
